objective: 이번 세션에서 학습된 비-자명 패턴을 검토하여 적절한 스킬/룰/훅에 적용 가능한 항목을 찾아 자동 적용. 적용 후 trainset 갱신 및 검증.
candidate_patterns: P1: NGC image hangs on certain DCs → use runpod-torch-v280 (encoded in runpod-pods)
P2: HF org slug case sensitivity (ThakiCloud vs thakicloud) (encoded in hf-hub)
P3: PEP 668 --break-system-packages on Ubuntu 24.04 (encoded in runpod-pods)
P4: deep-gemm install before vllm 0.7+ Blackwell (encoded in runpod_bootstrap.sh + runpod-nvfp4-quantize)
P5: ModelOpt full NVFP4_DEFAULT_CFG required (no partial) (encoded in runpod-nvfp4-quantize)
P6: export_hf_checkpoint omits tokenizer → save_pretrained workaround (encoded in runpod-nvfp4-quantize)
P7: pyarrow/datasets SIGABRT on teardown — output OK, use line count verification (encoded in runpod-nvfp4-quantize)
P8: Stop hook flag-file pattern (used 2x: kb-intel-compile + jarvis goal-continuation) — NOT yet documented as reusable rule
P9: REPO_ROOT path depth bug pattern (parents[N] miscount in nested skills/scripts) — NEW
P10: Mechanical-only extraction (no LLM API calls) skill pattern for cost=0 batch jobs — NEW
P11: NGC image vs runpod-torch base image trade-off (warm cache reduces 14min hang) — partially encoded
P12: Cross-repo intelligence dedup via internal intel_registry (encoded in twitter-timeline-to-slack/x-to-slack)
